message:
docs: add canonical lock order spec for RuntimeState sharding (bd-20way)

Define deterministic lock acquisition order E→D→B→A→C for the proposed
5-shard RuntimeState architecture:
- E: Config (read-only, no lock)
- D: Instrumentation (trace/metrics, append-only)
- B: Regions (gates task/obligation admission)
- A: Tasks (hottest shard, per-poll)
- C: Obligations (last, triggered by task completion)

Includes lock combination table for all operations, disallowed sequences
(deadlock risk), proposed ShardGuard API, and extension guidance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
